ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the city is located in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the city is located in */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the city is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_of_life_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality of life index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "quality_of_life_index" REAL /* Quality of life index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank based on user interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchasing_power_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchasing power index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "purchasing_power_index" REAL /* Purchasing power index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchasing_power_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "safety_index" REAL /* Safety index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_care_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health care index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "health_care_index" REAL /* Health care index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "healthcare_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the city */,
  "doctor_patient_ratio" REAL /* Doctor-to-patient ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_care_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost of living index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_price_to_income_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property price to income ratio */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the ratio belongs to */,
  "property_price_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Property price to income ratio value */,
  "ratio_date" TEXT /* Date when the ratio was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "median_home_price" INTEGER /* Median home price in the city */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_price_to_income_ratios_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_commute_time_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic commute time index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "traffic_commute_time_index" REAL /* Traffic commute time index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "average_commute_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average commute time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_commute_time_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "climate_index" REAL /* Climate index value */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average rainfall in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, business, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the dashboard was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
